description_long: This is a stylized, compact model of a commercial passenger airplane with a rounded fuselage and exaggerated proportions. The body is predominantly white with blue-tinted cockpit windows and a pink and blue accent line running along the wings and tail. The text 'UK Holidays' is printed in blue and pink on the rear fuselage near the tail fin. The airplane features two large underwing engines, swept-back wings, and a conventional vertical tail fin with a horizontal stabilizer. The landing gear is not visible, and the overall design is cartoonish, with smooth, glossy surfaces and simplified details.
description: A stylized, white commercial airplane with blue and pink accents, large underwing engines, and 'UK Holidays' branding. The design is rounded and cartoon-like with smooth, glossy surfaces.
description_view_0: Side view showing the 'UK Holidays' text, swept-back wings, and large underwing engine on the left side.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded nose, cockpit windows, and both large underwing engines.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with 'UK Holidays' text visible, showing the right engine and tail fin.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the tail fin, horizontal stabilizers, and the full wingspan.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and no visible winglets or dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with multiple windows.
